summary: Iteration 124 - PublicPortfolio.tsx design elevation testing complete. All 6 improvements verified and working correctly. The public portfolio page at /portfolio/{userId} displays industry-aware content, proper empty states, scroll-reveal animations, and responsive grid layout.

issues: Line 235 has hardcoded #6C2EDB instead of brandPrimary variable for 'Go Home' button
'Work' and 'Contact' nav links don't meet 44px touch target (31x22px and 50x20px respectively)
'Powered by KOLOR Studio' footer link is 147x18px - below 44px touch target

action_items: MINOR: Replace hardcoded #6C2EDB with brandPrimary variable on line 235 in error state
MINOR: Consider increasing touch target size for nav links 'Work' and 'Contact'
critical_code_review_comments: Industry-aware copy working for PHOTOGRAPHY, DESIGN, FINE_ART industries
Scroll-reveal animations properly use IntersectionObserver with prefers-reduced-motion support
Empty portfolio state shows 'Coming soon' with brand-colored circle
Empty filter state shows 'No works match your filter' with 'Clear filters' button
Stats strip uses card-style layout with proper border-radius and padding
Portfolio grid uses responsive Tailwind classes (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3)
First item has full-width hero layout with col-span classes
Image skeleton placeholder (#F3F4F6) and fade-in animation working
test_credentials: Email: bookingtest@test.com, Password: password123, userId: cmn0umxwx0000k8sy48g5le5u
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 124 PublicPortfolio.tsx improvements verified: (1) Hero section has 3px gradient bar below studio name using brandPrimary with 0.4 opacity, industry-aware subline for PHOTOGRAPHY/DESIGN/FINE_ART. (2) Stats strip shows Works/Categories/Featured in card-style layout with border-radius:12 and proper padding. (3) Portfolio grid uses responsive Tailwind classes, first item has col-span-3 for hero layout, images have #F3F4F6 skeleton and fade-in. (4) Inquiry CTA uses industry-aware headline/subline/button text. (5) Empty portfolio shows 'Coming soon' with brand-colored circle and 'Get in touch' link. Empty filter shows 'No works match your filter' with 'Clear filters' button (data-testid='portfolio-clear-filters'). (6) Testimonials and inquiry CTA sections have 'portfolio-reveal' class for scroll animations with IntersectionObserver. Test user has empty portfolio so empty state was verified. All data-testid attributes preserved.

gradient_bar.details: 3px height bar with brandPrimary color and 0.4 opacity found

industry_subline.details: Photography-specific subline: 'Explore KOLOR STUDIO's photography — from inquiries to delivered galleries.'

card_layout.details: Stats cards have border-radius:12, padding:16px 24px, border:0.5px solid #EDE8F5

hero_first_item.details: col-span-1 sm:col-span-2 lg:col-span-3 for first item

industry_headline.details: 'Ready to book your session?' for PHOTOGRAPHY

industry_subline.details: 'Tell me about your shoot and I'll be in touch within 24 hours.'

brand_circle.details: Circle uses brandPrimary with 12% and 30% opacity

BRAND_COLORS.details: No hardcoded #6C2EDB in rendered page (uses brandPrimary variable). Minor: error state has hardcoded color.

TOUCH_TARGETS.details: Main CTA buttons meet 44px target. Nav links (Work, Contact) and footer link below 44px.
